message:
Running command: 
# 4h40m CPU / ~76.4min elapsed. 3rd iteration at 80% with 28,814 violations.
# DRT1 3rd iter 80% = 28,814 violations. MATCH!
# 3rd iter 90% will be at ~15:34 elapsed, completes at ~18:05.
# Continue monitoring.

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 120
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break

    dd if=/proc/1100961/fd/11 bs=65536 count=512 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 5; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -2 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEPS=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -2 | tr '\n' ',')
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B FINAL=$FINAL STEPS=$STEPS | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done

extras.command:
echo "=== DRT2 $(date) ==="
LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null || echo "EXITED"

dd if=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 bs=131072 count=512 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
PD=$!; sleep 8; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -20 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "No final"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -5
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -4

message:
Running command: 
# 5h03m CPU / ~83min elapsed. 4th iteration at 40% with 9,886 violations.
# DRT1 4th iter 40% = 9,886 violations. PERFECT MATCH!
# 4th iteration should complete in ~3 more minutes.
# After 4th: violations go to 2,428 → then quick convergence!
# Continue monitoring closely.

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 30
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break

    dd if=/proc/1100961/fd/11 bs=131072 count=512 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 5; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -3 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT71=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEPS=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -2 | tr '\n' ',')
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B ODB=$DRT71 FINAL=$FINAL STEPS=$STEPS | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
